odeComponent.htmlView:
This project is designed as a learning situation in which students will create a sustainable travel guide about English-speaking countries.

Students will use digital tools such as Canva, Genially or VistaCreate to design an interactive and visually attractive guide.

The project promotes creativity, digital competence, collaboration and environmental awareness.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260402173804541P7F","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"(3 - 4 students)","textTextarea":"

This project is designed as a learning situation in which students will create a sustainable travel guide about English-speaking countries.

\n

Students will use digital tools such as Canva, Genially or VistaCreate to design an interactive and visually attractive guide.

\n

The project promotes creativity, digital competence, collaboration and environmental awareness.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: This project is aimed at students of 3º ESO. Students will explore different English-speaking countries and design a sustainable travel guide. The main goal is to develop communicative, digital and social skills while promoting sustainability and responsible tourism. The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), ensuring inclusion and accessibility for all students.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260402174218147GU4","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project is aimed at students of 3º ESO. Students will explore different English-speaking countries and design a sustainable travel guide. The main goal is to develop communicative, digital and social skills while promoting sustainability and responsible tourism. The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), ensuring inclusion and accessibility for all students.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

Author
This project has been created by Noelia Espinar Espejo

Project Description
This eXeLearning project has been designed as a didactic resource for students. It includes a set of activities, resources and evaluation tools aimed at developing digital competence, collaboration and responsible use of technology.

This material is intended for educational purposes and can be used and adapted by other teachers in their classrooms.

License
This work is licensed under a Creative Commons license.

Author
This project has been created by Noelia Espinar Espejo

Project Description
This eXeLearning project has been designed as a didactic resource for students. It includes a set of activities, resources and evaluation tools aimed at developing digital competence, collaboration and responsible use of technology.

This material is intended for educational purposes and can be used and adapted by other teachers in their classrooms.

License
This work is licensed under a Creative Commons license.

odeComponent.htmlView:
General information about this educational resource
Title TRAVELLING BROADENS THE MIND
Description Corregido por Ana
Authorship NOELIA ESPINAR ESPEJO
License Public domain

This content was created with eXeLearning, your free and open source editor to create educational resources.
